key_files.relevance: Add onDelete prop and Trash2 button; no AlertDialog needed here — Board holds the confirm dialog
Wire handleDelete(), pass onDelete to TaskCard at both mobile and desktop call sites; hold AlertDialog state
Add leave-group UI: LogOut icon button always visible per group item; leaveGroup() call; onGroupLeft callback; inline error display
task.deleted event type already defined — no changes needed
task.deleted already handled in applyEvent() with LWW guard — no changes needed
dispatch() already handles any TaskEvent including task.deleted — no changes needed
clearEvents(groupId) sets array to [] — sufficient for leave cleanup
useMarmot() provides client; groupsUpdated listener auto-updates sidebar after leaveGroup()
Manages selectedGroupId state; must reset to null on group leave; wires GroupManager with onGroupSelect
Unit tests for task.deleted already exist (accept + reject paths); extend for Board dispatch
Model for delete-task E2E test; uses isMobile guard, .first() on locators, data-column selector
Model for leave-group E2E test; group-create then assert pattern
authenticateViaBunker(page) — required by all E2E tests
clearAppState(page) — called in beforeEach of every spec

patterns.name: Prop-threading for card actions
patterns.description: TaskCardProps declares all callbacks; Board creates handle* async functions and passes by reference to each TaskCard at both mobile and desktop call sites

patterns.name: Optimistic dispatch pattern
patterns.description: Board.handle*() calls dispatch(event); task-store applies optimistically + persists to IDB + sends to MLS

patterns.name: Local async state in GroupManager
patterns.description: Paired useState for in-flight flag + useState for error; try/catch/finally; error rendered as

patterns.name: Callback prop for parent notification
patterns.description: GroupManager notifies page via onGroupSelect callback; leave should add onGroupLeft?: () => void prop

patterns.name: E2E isMobile drawer guard
patterns.description: page.viewportSize().width < 768 check before sidebar interaction; getByRole button open-menu

patterns.name: E2E strict-mode .first()
patterns.description: All locators matching desktop+mobile DOM duplicates must use .first()

patterns.name: data-testid for E2E targets
patterns.description: Interactive elements get data-testid; task delete: task-delete-btn/task-delete-confirm; group leave: group-leave-btn/group-leave-confirm

similar_features: Task status change (Board.tsx:49) — identical dispatch pattern for task.deleted
Disconnect button (ConnectionStatus.tsx:63) — destructive action with data-testid

architecture.task_delete: Frontend-only: add onDelete prop to TaskCard, handleDelete in Board, AlertDialog for confirmation, dispatch task.deleted event. Backend/reducer already complete.
architecture.group_leave: Add onGroupLeft prop to GroupManager; call client.leaveGroup(groupId) then clearEvents(groupId); GroupManager emits onGroupLeft on success; page.tsx resets selectedGroupId to null. groupsUpdated event from marmot auto-removes group from sidebar.

extension_points: TaskCard: add onDelete prop + Trash2 button
Board: add handleDelete + AlertDialog state + onDelete wiring
GroupManager: add onGroupLeft prop + LogOut button + leaveGroup() call
app/page.tsx: add onGroupLeft handler resetting selectedGroupId
src/components/ui/alert-dialog.tsx: new shadcn component (radix already present)

testing.unit: Extend task-reducer.test.ts with Board-level dispatch test; existing reducer tests already cover accept/reject paths
testing.e2e: New e2e/tests/tasks.spec.ts test: create task → click delete btn → confirm → assert task gone. New e2e/tests/groups.spec.ts test: create group → click leave btn → confirm → assert group gone from sidebar.

conventions: Async handlers inside component body (not useCallback unless needed as dependency)
Lucide icons from lucide-react: Trash2 for delete, LogOut for leave
Button size='xs' or size='icon-xs' for action buttons in cards
cn() from @/lib/utils for conditional Tailwind classes
Vitest: explicit imports (describe/it/expect from 'vitest'), environment: node
E2E: all commands via make; baseURL localhost:3100
